pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 中译英

items.zh: 请问，最近的地铁站在哪里？——就在拐角处。
items.answer: Excuse me, where is the nearest subway station? -- Its just around the corner.

items.zh: 我怎么去博物馆？——直走在拐角左转。
items.answer: How do I get to the museum? -- Go straight and turn left at the corner.

pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 英译中

items.en: Is there a pharmacy near here? -- Yes, theres one across the street.
items.answer: 附近有药店吗？——有的，街对面有一家。

items.en: How far is it from here? -- Its about 10 minutes on foot.
items.answer: 从这里有多远？——走路大约10分钟。

items.en: Am I going the right way to the station? -- Yes, keep going straight.
items.answer: 我去车站的方向对吗？——对，直走。

pipeline.title: 问路与位置 · 句型
slots: subway station, bus stop, ATM, restroom, pharmacy, hospital

items.answer: Where is the nearest subway station?

slotValues.slot1: subway station, bus stop, ATM, restroom, pharmacy, hospital

items.answer: Where are the restrooms?

slotValues.slot1: restrooms, elevators, stairs, exits, lockers, ticket machines

items.answer: How do I get to the museum?

slotValues.slot1: the museum, the airport, the train station, the city center, your hotel

items.answer: Is there a pharmacy near here?

slotValues.slot1: pharmacy, supermarket, post office, park, bank, coffee shop

items.answer: How far is it from here?

slotValues.slot1: the airport, your hotel, the beach, downtown, the hospital

pipeline.title: 问时间与交通 · 中译英

items.zh: 我在哪里买票？——你可以在那边的机器上买。
items.answer: Where do I buy a ticket? -- You can buy one at the machine over there.

pipeline.title: 问时间与交通 · 英译中

items.en: How much does it cost to go to the airport? -- About 120 yuan.
items.answer: 去机场要多少钱？——大约120元。

pipeline.title: 问时间与交通 · 句型
slots: the museum, the store, the bank, the movie, the meeting

items.answer: What time does the museum open?

slotValues.slot1: the museum, the store, the bank, the movie, the meeting

items.answer: What time is the next train to Shanghai?

slotValues.slot1: the next train, the last bus, your flight, the check-in, the show

items.answer: Which bus goes to the city center?
How long does it take to get there?

slotValues.slot1: get there, walk, drive, fly, get through security, get a taxi

items.answer: Where do I buy a ticket?

slotValues.slot1: buy a ticket, pay, check in, get a taxi, wait for the bus

pipeline.title: 购物问询 · 中译英

items.zh: 你们有这个小号的吗？——我看看。有的，给你。
items.answer: Do you have this in a small size? -- Let me check. Yes, here you are.

pipeline.title: 购物问询 · 英译中

items.en: Do you take cards? -- Yes, we take all major cards.
items.answer: 你们收卡吗？——收，所有主要卡都收。

pipeline.title: 购物问询 · 句型

items.answer: How much is this?
How much are these?
Do you have this in a small size?

pipeline.title: 试穿与尺寸 · 中译英

items.zh: 我想试穿这个。试衣间在哪？——那边，左边。
items.answer: I want to try this on. Where is the fitting room? -- Over there, on the left.

pipeline.title: 试穿与尺寸 · 英译中

items.en: Do you have this in medium? -- Let me check for you.
items.answer: 你们有中号的吗？——我帮你查一下。

items.answer: Do you have other colors?

slotValues.slot1: colors, styles, sizes, options, brands, ones

items.zh: 你推荐什么？——烤鱼很受欢迎。
items.answer: What do you recommend? -- The grilled fish is very popular.

items.answer: I want to see the menu, please.

pipeline.title: 认识新朋友 · 中译英

items.zh: 你是做什么的？——我是学生。/ 我在医院工作。

items.en: What do you do for fun? -- I like watching movies and hiking.
items.answer: 你平时玩什么？——我喜欢看电影和徒步。

pipeline.title: 打电话找人 · 中译英

items.zh: 王先生方便接电话吗？——对不起，他正在开会。
items.answer: Is Mr. Wang available? -- Sorry, hes in a meeting right now.

pipeline.title: 打电话找人 · 英译中

items.en: When is he back? -- He is back in about an hour.
items.answer: 他什么时候回来？——大约一小时后回来。

pipeline.title: 打电话找人 · 句型

items.answer: Is Mr Wang there, please?
Who's calling, please? — This is Toms friend.
Is Mr Wang available?
When is he back?
When is a good time to call back?
items.pattern: When is a good time to ___?

pipeline.title: 留言与回电 · 中译英

items.zh: 我想留言，可以吗？——好的，请说。
items.answer: I want to leave a message. Is that okay? -- Sure. Go ahead.

pipeline.title: 留言与回电 · 英译中

items.en: Please ask him to call me back. -- Sure. Whats your name and number?
items.answer: 请让他回电话给我。——好的，你的名字和电话是？

pipeline.title: 紧急呼救 · 中译英

items.zh: 最近的医院在哪？——大约3公里远。
items.answer: Where is the nearest hospital? -- Its about 3 kilometers from here.

pipeline.title: 紧急呼救 · 英译中

items.en: Is everyone okay? -- I think so. One person is a little hurt.
items.answer: 大家都还好吗？——是的，有一个人受了点伤。

pipeline.title: 紧急呼救 · 句型

items.answer: Where is the nearest hospital?
How do I call an ambulance?
Is there a doctor here?
Is everyone okay?

pipeline.title: 问路求助 · 中译英

items.zh: 请帮帮我，我迷路了。——好的，你想去哪？
items.answer: Please help me. Im lost. -- Of course. Where do you want to go?

pipeline.title: 问路求助 · 句型

pipeline.title: 看病问诊 · 中译英

items.zh: 我不舒服。最近的医院在哪？——打车大约10分钟。
items.answer: I dont feel well. Where is the nearest hospital? -- Its about 10 minutes by taxi.

pipeline.title: 看病问诊 · 英译中

items.en: How much does it cost to see a doctor here? -- The consultation fee is about 200 yuan.
items.answer: 在这里看医生多少钱？——挂号费大约200元。

pipeline.title: 看病问诊 · 句型

items.answer: What do I do? I have a bad headache.
